title: Slovakian Grape and Tomato Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Slovakia, made with roasted grapes and tomatoes.
instructions: 2. Cut the top off the tomatoes and scoop out the insides.
3. Place the tomatoes on a baking sheet and drizzle with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
4. Roast the tomatoes in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
5. In a large saucepan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
6. Add the roasted grapes and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to soften.
7. Add the roasted tomatoes to the saucepan and stir to combine.
8. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
10. Serve with a slice of Slovakian bread on the side.
